title: Netherite Elytra
description: This resource pack adds an elytra that looks like it is made of netherite, perfect for making your elytra fit your armor.
body: A netherite elytra, the netherite elytra is supposed to look like it was forged out of netherite. It is pefect for your armor (netherite again). Pls try the elytra. Pls, Pls get it. It will look good, trust.
